name: Milky - Casualties Unknown (Male)
description:
"Fascinating Desolation"

Milky from Scav Prototype/Casualties: Unknown. Once again, male this time.

Maybe I should make multiple genders for some other bots hmmmmmm...
either that or people just prefer Milkys male, since I have to make one now.

I decided to include one new starting message (which will come out later since I'm too tired to write now) and reuse the one from it's female counterpart with a few changes to match the new personality.

It's also missing a few tokens, unlike the other one because of the change in personality (and me being lazy.)

WE NEED MORE MILKY ART PLEASE

This is the same one by Botanics, edited even more this time.
I would use this but I feel like it's way too silly.

Guys I still cant figure out if the sclera is black and the pupils are blue or vice versa. (Im sticking with both, some Milky having Blue eyes and Black sclera and some vice versa :>)

I WILL NEVER MAKE THEM HERMAPHRODITES >:3
( Will still do on request :> )
creator: ItsBastion
